subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have sent unto thee aforetime a mighty Tablet, that thine eyes might be solaced thereby and thy countenance illumined. Thus hath it been [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و لقد ارسلنا الیک من قبل لوحا منیعا لتقر به عینک و یستضی ء وجهک و کذلک کان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital, @call to action
